prompt: create a boxplot showing the accuracy of MMLU benchmarks from 'gpt-3-5-turbo' 'gpt-4', 'o4-mini', 'claude-4-sonnet' with a accuracy variance showing the difference from each subjects
prompt_refined: Generate a boxplot visualizing the accuracy of MMLU benchmarks. The plot should display separate boxplots for each of the following large language models: 'gpt-3.5-turbo', 'gpt-4', 'o4-mini', and 'claude-4-sonnet'. Each boxplot must clearly show the median, interquartile range (IQR), and whiskers representing the full distribution and variance of accuracy scores for each model. Label the x-axis as 'Large Language Models' and the y-axis as 'Accuracy'.
objects: Four distinct boxplots (one for each model)
Interquartile range (IQR) box for each boxplot
